subject: New Assignment: Software Engineer – Healthcare
body:
Hi there,

I wanted to share an exciting opportunity that just came in from NordHealth, a company in the healthcare space.

They are scaling their engineering team and are looking for a Software Engineer to join on a contract basis.

What they're looking for:

  • Python
  • Kubernetes
  • MySQL

Practical details:

  • Start: 2023-06-19
  • Duration: 12 months
  • Location: TBD
  • Rate: up to 950 SEK/h

If this sounds like a fit, or you know someone who might be – reach out!

Best regards,
Niklas Persson
Country Manager
Nexum Consulting
Tel: +46 70 012 34 56
